calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Appoint Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were heard: PTR-14-298229 Untenberger Trust & PTR-14-298260 Trust B.
Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica for petitioner (via court call). Deborah Fox for (Proposed Trustee on case 298229)&(Temporary Trustee on case 298260) Debra Dolch.

The Court confirmed that there is no issue/objections to dispensing with notice to Ms. Schaefer & Tina.
Re 298260: Ms. Zulaica reported that there are no additional properties, that the house was sold and proceeds distributed, that the amount was under $180,000.00 and would be covered by the $200,000.00 bond already in place, that there is no income from real property, that the request for attorney's fees has been dropped as it is being handled in the partition action and that they see no reason to have this trust be under court supervision. Ms. Fox stated that there is a $180,000.00 general bond to be filed, is in agreement that the trust does not need to be under court supervision, that it is a simple administration to marshal assets and distribute to the beneficiaries and that there is not a need for accountings.
Re 298229: Ms. Zulacia reported that there is money in an interest bearing account, that she cannot tell what the interest amount is but says maybe $30.00 per year, that a $600,000.00 bond will be sufficient, that the declaration filed in December has not changed in regards to attorney fees and costs, that she has confirmed with counsel for the other beneficiary that there are no objections to the fees and costs and that if the petition is not granted they will as for a compliance hearing. The Petitions for Instructions on both cases were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
